metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_116
metadata.comment:
Rationale: It is demonstrated with immuno-EM and immunofluorescence that RIM is specifically localizaed at the active zone in spinal cord and ribbon synapses. It makes use of two separate antibodies, plus additional controls (including secondary only). Wang et al. 2016 provides a knockout-control for the immunofluorescence, while Tang et.al. 2016 demonstrates the active zone localization using STORM microscopy.

10/2/2017 Pim:
-Fig.3A: spinal cord --> wide-field microscopy
-Fig3B: retinal ribbon synapse --> immuno-EM. Experimental description: Double and single immunofluorescence labeling of cryostat sections from rat spinal cord and bovine retina was performed27 with two independent polyclonal Rim antibodies and multiple monoclonal antibodies to synaptic vesicle proteins.
